pi_items.source: Magento 2 documentation: Stores > Configuration > Customers > Customer Configuration supports 1-4 street address lines with default of 3
Magento 2 Nooptreq source model (Magento\Config\Model\Config\Source\Nooptreq) returns 'req' for Required option
Magento 2 Nooptreq source model (Magento\Config\Model\Config\Source\Nooptreq) returns 'req' for Required option
Magento 2 standard email identities include 'support' for Customer Support section (trans_email/ident_support)
Magento 2 password configuration allows numeric values >= 1; default is 8, metadata value of 10 is valid
Magento 2 required character classes configuration accepts values 1-4 representing Lowercase, Uppercase, Digits, and Special Characters

privileged_info_summary: The task is a Magento 2 e-commerce configuration exercise where users configure customer settings for a B2B portal launch. All metadata claims are verified as correct: street address configuration supports 3 lines (verified range 1-4, default 3), Tax/VAT field is set to Required (verified 'req' value from Magento Nooptreq source model), Date of Birth field is set to Required (verified 'req' value from Magento Nooptreq source model), email sender is set to Customer Support (verified 'support' is a standard Magento 2 email identity), minimum password length is set to 10 characters (verified as valid configuration), and required character classes is set to 4 (verified as maximum valid value for all character class types). The data is real Magento 2 application configuration, not synthetic.
